・ Generation and copyediting of some text

title: ROMEO IS A DEAD MAN
additional_info:
Mature Content Description
The developers describe the content like this:

			This game contains frequent depictions of intense violence, blood, and gore. During combat against humanoid enemies, players may see dismemberment effects and exaggerated damage visuals.

The game also includes visual elements that some players may find disturbing or frightening, such as corpses, grotesque enemy designs, humanoid creatures with decayed appearances, and unsettling environmental imagery.

Certain parts of the story and presentation reference themes of death and self-harm. In some scenes where decayed humanoid enemy characters are introduced, there are depictions suggesting falling from heights or hanging. These portrayals are used to emphasize the unnatural nature of the enemies and the game’s dark world, and are not interactive acts performed by the player. However, these themes may be sensitive for some audiences.

The game contains mild suggestive themes and occasional character designs or visual framing that may imply sexuality, but there are no explicit sexual acts or nudity.

The overall tone is dark and violent, featuring grotesque imagery consistent with a mature-rated action title.

title: Dragon Traveler
additional_info:
Mature Content Description
The developers describe the content like this:

			1. Sexual & Suggestive Content

The game contains non-explicit sexual innuendo and flirtatious dialogue within its fantasy-themed storylines.

Some character designs for both male and female characters feature revealing or form-fitting fantasy outfits that may expose areas such as shoulders, back, abdomen, or legs. The artistic style is inspired by gothic, punk, and fantasy aesthetics.

Certain cutscenes, close-up character views (e.g., in the “Affinity” gallery or skin showcase screens), focus on these character designs and artistic presentations.

2. Visual Elements with BDSM / Fetish-Inspired Aesthetics

Important Note: The game includes visual design elements that are stylistically inspired by BDSM and fetish subcultures. These are presented as part of the fantasy costume and world-building aesthetic, and are not associated with any explicit sexual activity or sexual violence.

Costumes & Accessories: Outfits for specific characters (e.g., Guide Fairy, Jormungandr, and Archangel Gabriele as seen in cutscenes) incorporate aesthetic items such as bondage straps, leather harnesses, collars, chain decorations, studded accessories, and corset-like structures. These designs are intended to convey traits like mystery, power, or a sense of being bound within the fantasy narrative.

Props & Environmental Themes: The game world may include decorative props with thematic implications (e.g., stylized ropes, hanging chains) and settings like dungeons or palaces that contribute to the atmospheric world-building.

Narrative Themes: Some storylines involve fantasy concepts like magical pacts, vows of servitude, or power restraints, exploring themes of loyalty, domination, and freedom common in fantasy literature. This is not a depiction of realistic BDSM relationships or practices.

3. Fantasy Violence

The game features cartoonish, fantasy-based combat involving actions like dragon breath, magical spells, and swordplay.

Combat is depicted through light effects, particle animations, and skill visuals. There is no realistic blood splatter, gore, dismemberment, detailed wound depiction, or prolonged suffering.

The level of violence is consistent with standards for mainstream fantasy role-playing games.

4. Content Summary

This game does NOT contain: Depictions of explicit sexual acts, nudity exposing genitalia, realistic blood/gore, sexual violence (e.g., rape), depiction of drug use, or discriminatory language targeting real-world groups.

This game DOES contain: Mild sexual innuendo, character costume designs with aesthetics inspired by certain subcultures (as detailed above), and cartoonish fantasy violence. All content serves the purpose of building its fantasy world and characters.

title: Shadow Empire
additional_info:
AI Generated Content Disclosure
The developers describe how their game uses AI Generated Content like this:

					Usage of AI-Generated and Assisted Illustrations in Shadow Empire
Post-release Illustration Creation Process


The developers use Midjourney and Nano Banana to generate high-resolution illustrations for new functionality added post-release, particularly for Vidcom and Stratagem artwork.


These images are often post-processed by hand, as well as enhanced using tools like Magnific, Topaz Labs, or other upscaling and refinement software.


AI in Post-release Portrait Art


Portraits: A base image is generated using Midjourney with a generic prompt such as “portrait of young woman, military.”


Smaller parts (eyes, nose, mouth, hair, etc.) are overlaid using DALL·E to create variations.


Aging effects are achieved by rendering an older skin texture with partial transparency over the younger base face. The older the character, the more opaque the overlay becomes. (Note: Eyes and lips often retain a youthful appearance.)


This effect is gradually applied using a limited number of sprite layers, allowing nuanced visual transitions.


AI-Generated Art in Post-release Game Content


The game includes AI-generated and AI-assisted illustrations for Vidcoms and Stratagems.


All such AI-generated art is pre-generated — no generative AI tools are called or used in real-time by the game itself.

The intention is to provide players with an option to toggle between the original and updated AI-enhanced graphics via preferences. (Note: This is an aim and may not yet apply to all content.)

title: Shadow Empire: Republica
additional_info:
AI Generated Content Disclosure
The developers describe how their game uses AI Generated Content like this:

					Usage of AI-Generated and Assisted Illustrations in Shadow Empire

1. Post-release Illustration Creation Process

- The developers use Midjourney to generate high-resolution illustrations for new functionality added post-release, particularly for Vidcom and Stratagem artwork.

- These images are often post-processed by hand, as well as enhanced using tools like Magnific, Topaz Labs, or other upscaling and refinement software.

2. AI in Post-release Portrait Art

- Portraits: A base image is generated using Midjourney with a generic prompt such as “portrait of young woman, military.”

- Smaller parts (eyes, nose, mouth, hair, etc.) are overlaid using DALL·E to create variations.

- Aging effects are achieved by rendering an older skin texture with partial transparency over the younger base face. The older the character, the more opaque the overlay becomes. (Note: Eyes and lips often retain a youthful appearance.)

- This effect is gradually applied using a limited number of sprite layers, allowing nuanced visual transitions.

3. AI-Generated Art in Post-release Game Content

- The game includes AI-generated and AI-assisted illustrations for Vidcoms and Stratagems.

- All such AI-generated art is pre-generated — no generative AI tools are called or used in real-time by the game itself.

- The intention is to provide players with an option to toggle between the original and updated AI-enhanced graphics via preferences. (Note: This is an aim and may not yet apply to all content.)

title: Killing Floor 3
additional_info:
Mature Content Description
The developers describe the content like this:

			Killing Floor 3 contains the following elements that can be considered mature content:

Graphic Violence: Players engage in first-person combat against bioengineered humanoids and monsters ("zeds") using firearms, sci-fi and flame-based weaponry, explosives, and melee weapons. Combat is extremely intense, with frequent depictions of dismemberment, decapitations, and exploding body parts. Realistic blood effects and slow-motion "Zed Time" sequences amplify the impact of gore.

Blood and Gore: Environments and characters are frequently splattered with copious amounts of blood. Dead enemies often remain in the environment as mutilated corpses, and some weapons cause extreme bodily trauma such as melting, burning, or tearing of flesh.

Strong Language: Dialogue and voice lines contain use of strong profanity spoken by both characters and NPCs during gameplay and narrative sequences.

Disturbing Themes: The game’s narrative involves biological experimentation and body horror which may be unsettling to younger audiences.
description: It’s 2091 and megacorp Horzine has produced the ultimate army: an obedient horde of bioengineered monsters called zeds. Now, join the rebel group Nightfall in this co-op action/horror FPS that puts you and your teammates in a battle for the future of humanity.
